5	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
6	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
7	#
8	# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
9	#
10	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
11	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
12	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
13	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
14	# limitations under the License.
15	"""
16	CLI: export ALL components of a multimodal checkpoint to ONNX in one command.
17	
18	Detects model type from ``config.json`` and exports:
19	    - LLM backbone        → ``<output_dir>/llm/model.onnx``
20	    - Visual encoder      → ``<output_dir>/visual/model.onnx``    (VLMs)
21	    - Audio encoder       → ``<output_dir>/audio/model.onnx``     (speech models)
22	    - Code2Wav vocoder    → ``<output_dir>/code2wav/model.onnx``  (Qwen3-Omni / Qwen3-TTS)
23	
24	Usage::
25	
26	    # From a source checkout or installed package:
27	    tensorrt-edgellm-export /path/to/checkpoint /tmp/onnx_out
28	
29	    # With explicit dtype
30	    tensorrt-edgellm-export /path/to/Qwen3-VL-7B /tmp/out --dtype float16
31	
32	    # With reduced vocabulary
33	    tensorrt-edgellm-export /path/to/model /tmp/out --reduced-vocab-dir /path/to/reduced_vocab
34	
35	Supported model types
36	----------------------
37	VLMs (LLM + visual encoder):
38	    qwen3_vl, qwen3_omni          (Qwen3-VL / Qwen3-Omni)
39	    qwen3_5, qwen3_5_moe          (Qwen3.5)
40	    qwen2_5_vl                    (Qwen2.5-VL)
41	    internvl_chat                 (InternVL3)
42	    internvl                      (InternVL3.5)
43	    phi4mm, phi4_multimodal       (Phi-4 Multimodal)
44	    gemma4, gemma4_unified        (Gemma4 multimodal checkpoints)
45	    NemotronH_Nano_VL_V2, NemotronH_Nano_Omni_Reasoning_V3
46	                                 (Nemotron-Omni)
47	
48	Audio models (LLM + audio encoder):
49	    qwen3_asr, qwen3_omni, qwen3_omni_thinker, gemma4_unified
50	    NemotronH_Nano_VL_V2, NemotronH_Nano_Omni_Reasoning_V3
51	                                 (Nemotron-Omni)
52	
53	LLM + Talker decoder + Code2Wav (no audio encoder):
54	    qwen3_tts    (Talker/CodePredictor are LLM decoders; Code2Wav uses speech_tokenizer/)
55	
56	LLM-only:
57	    All other model types supported by :mod:`tensorrt_edgellm.model.AutoModel`.
58	"""
59	
60	import argparse
61	import json
62	import logging
63	import os
64	import sys
65	from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Optional
66	
67	import torch
68	
69	if TYPE_CHECKING:
70	    from ..config import ModelConfig
71	
72	from ..checkpoint.checkpoint_utils import normalize_rope_scaling_for_runtime
73	from ..external_weights import (EXTERNAL_WEIGHT_CHOICES,
74	                                resolve_externalize_weights)
75	
76	logging.basicConfig(
77	    level=logging.INFO,
78	    format="%(asctime)s  %(levelname)-8s  %(name)s: %(message)s",
79	    datefmt="%H:%M:%S",
80	)
81	logger = logging.getLogger("tensorrt_edgellm.scripts.export")
82	
83	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
84	# Model type classification
85	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
86	
87	_NEMOTRON_OMNI_MODEL_TYPES = frozenset([
88	    "NemotronH_Nano_VL_V2",
89	    "NemotronH_Nano_Omni_Reasoning_V3",
90	])
91	
92	_GEMMA4_MODEL_TYPES = frozenset([
93	    "gemma4",
94	    "gemma4_text",
95	    "gemma4_unified",
96	    "gemma4_unified_text",
97	])
98	
99	_VLM_MODEL_TYPES = frozenset([
100	    "qwen3_vl",
101	    "qwen3_omni",
102	    "qwen3_omni_moe",
103	    "qwen3_5",
104	    "qwen3_5_moe",
105	    "qwen2_5_vl",
106	    "internvl",
107	    "internvl_chat",
108	    "phi4mm",
109	    "phi4_multimodal",
110	    "gemma4",
111	    "gemma4_unified",
112	    "alpamayo_r1",
113	    *_NEMOTRON_OMNI_MODEL_TYPES,
114	])
115	
116	_AUDIO_MODEL_TYPES = frozenset([
117	    "gemma4",
118	    "qwen3_asr",
119	    "qwen3_omni",
120	    "qwen3_omni_thinker",
121	    "qwen3_omni_moe",
122	    "qwen3_omni_moe_thinker",
123	    "gemma4_unified",
124	    *_NEMOTRON_OMNI_MODEL_TYPES,
125	    # qwen3_tts intentionally excluded: Qwen3-TTS has NO audio encoder.
126	    # Its Talker and CodePredictor are LLM decoders exported via the LLM pipeline.
127	])
128	
129	# Subset of audio models whose LLM config follows the Qwen-style
130	# ``thinker_config`` layout for modality-token IDs and chat-template tokens.
131	# Excludes Nemotron-Omni, which has its own field names
132	# (``img_context_token_id`` / ``sound_context_token_id``) at the source-config
133	# root and is handled by ``_collect_tokens_from_nemotron_root``.
134	_ASR_LLM_MODEL_TYPES = (_AUDIO_MODEL_TYPES - _NEMOTRON_OMNI_MODEL_TYPES -
135	                        {"gemma4_unified"})
136	
137	_CODE2WAV_MODEL_TYPES = frozenset([
138	    "qwen3_omni",
139	    "qwen3_omni_moe",
140	    "qwen3_tts",
141	])
142	
143	_ACTION_MODEL_TYPES = frozenset([
144	    "alpamayo_r1",
145	])
146	# Which LLM-family components each model ships.  Default (unlisted model types)
147	# is ``{"thinker"}``.  Add a new Talker/CP-bearing model by listing it here; no
148	# other bookkeeping in this file is needed for component dispatch.
149	_LLM_COMPONENTS: dict[str, frozenset[str]] = {
150	    "qwen3_tts": frozenset(["talker", "code_predictor"]),  # no thinker
151	    "qwen3_omni": frozenset(["thinker", "talker", "code_predictor"]),
152	    "qwen3_omni_moe": frozenset(["thinker", "talker", "code_predictor"]),
153	}
154	_DEFAULT_LLM_COMPONENTS = frozenset(["thinker"])
155	
156	
157	def _has_visual(model_type: str) -> bool:
158	    return model_type in _VLM_MODEL_TYPES
159	
160	
161	def _has_audio(model_type: str) -> bool:
162	    return model_type in _AUDIO_MODEL_TYPES
163	
164	
165	def _checkpoint_audio_config(config: dict) -> "dict | None":
166	    """Locate the audio-encoder config wherever the checkpoint stores it.
167	
168	    Gemma4 / Gemma4-Unified keep ``audio_config`` at the root; Qwen3-ASR /
169	    Qwen3-Omni nest it under ``thinker_config``; Nemotron-Omni names it
170	    ``sound_config``. Returns ``None`` when the checkpoint genuinely has no
171	    audio encoder (e.g. Gemma4 dense with ``"audio_config": null``).
172	    """
173	    return (config.get("audio_config")
174	            or (config.get("thinker_config") or {}).get("audio_config")
175	            or config.get("sound_config"))
176	
177	
178	def _has_action(model_type: str) -> bool:
179	    return model_type in _ACTION_MODEL_TYPES
180	
181	
182	def _has_code2wav(model_type: str) -> bool:
183	    return model_type in _CODE2WAV_MODEL_TYPES
184	
185	
186	def _has_llm_component(model_type: str, component: str) -> bool:
187	    """Whether ``model_type`` exports ``component`` as part of its LLM family.
188	
189	    ``component`` is one of ``"thinker"``, ``"talker"``, ``"code_predictor"``.
190	    """
191	    return component in _LLM_COMPONENTS.get(model_type,
192	                                            _DEFAULT_LLM_COMPONENTS)
193	
194	
195	def _is_alpamayo(model_type: str) -> bool:
196	    return model_type == "alpamayo_r1"
197	
198	
199	# Default output sub-path for every component.  Model types that need a
200	# non-default path only list the components that differ in ``_LAYOUT_OVERRIDES``.
201	_DEFAULT_LAYOUT: dict[str, str] = {
202	    "thinker": "llm",
203	    "talker": "talker",
204	    "code_predictor": "code_predictor",
205	    "audio": "audio",
206	    "code2wav": "code2wav",
207	    "visual": "visual",
208	    "action": "action",
209	    "mtp_draft": "mtp_draft",
210	    "dflash_draft": "dflash_draft",
211	}
212	
213	# Per-model overrides on top of ``_DEFAULT_LAYOUT``.
214	_LAYOUT_OVERRIDES: dict[str, dict[str, str]] = {
215	    "qwen3_omni": {
216	        "thinker": "llm/thinker",
217	        "talker": "llm/talker",
218	        "code_predictor": "llm/code_predictor",
219	        "audio": "audio/audio_encoder",
220	        "code2wav": "audio/code2wav",
221	        "visual": "vision",
222	    },
223	    "qwen3_tts": {
224	        # Qwen3-TTS has no thinker; the Talker is written under ``llm/`` so
225	        # existing engine-build scripts that expect a single ``llm/`` dir
226	        # keep working.
227	        "talker": "llm",
228	    },
229	}
230	
231	
232	def _layout_for(model_type: str, component: str) -> str:
233	    """Return the output sub-path for ``component`` under the export root."""
234	    return _LAYOUT_OVERRIDES.get(model_type,
235	                                 {}).get(component, _DEFAULT_LAYOUT[component])
236	
237	
238	# Helpers
239	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
240	
241	
242	def _resolve_model_dir(model: str) -> str:
243	    if os.path.isdir(model):
244	        return model
245	    try:
246	        from huggingface_hub import snapshot_download
247	    except ImportError:
248	        logger.error("huggingface_hub is not installed. "
249	                     "Install it or provide a local path.")
250	        sys.exit(1)
251	    logger.info("Downloading %s from Hugging Face Hub ...", model)
252	    return snapshot_download(model)
253	
254	
255	def _resolve_mtp_draft_dir(mtp_draft_dir: str) -> str:
256	    """Resolve a user-provided paired MTP draft checkpoint path or HF repo ID."""
257	    if os.path.isdir(mtp_draft_dir):
258	        return os.path.abspath(mtp_draft_dir)
259	    if os.path.isabs(mtp_draft_dir) or mtp_draft_dir.startswith("."):
260	        return os.path.abspath(mtp_draft_dir)
261	    return _resolve_model_dir(mtp_draft_dir)
262	
263	
264	def _load_config(model_dir: str) -> dict:
265	    cfg_path = os.path.join(model_dir, "config.json")
266	    if not os.path.exists(cfg_path):
267	        logger.error("config.json not found in %s", model_dir)
268	        sys.exit(1)
269	    with open(cfg_path) as f:
270	        return json.load(f)
271	
272	
273	def _get_llm_text_config(config: dict) -> dict:
274	    """Return the promoted text/LLM config dict when present."""
275	    for key in ("text_config", "llm_config", "language_config"):
276	        sub = config.get(key)
277	        if isinstance(sub, dict) and sub.get("hidden_size") is not None:
278	            return sub
279	    return config
280	
281	
282	def _has_mtp(config: dict) -> bool:
283	    """Return True when the checkpoint exposes the MTP branch."""
284	    text_cfg = _get_llm_text_config(config)
285	    return bool(text_cfg.get("mtp_num_hidden_layers") is not None)
286	
287	
288	def _normalize_gemma4_layer_type(layer_type: str) -> str:
289	    if layer_type in ("sliding_attention", "full_attention"):
290	        return layer_type
291	    raise ValueError(
292	        f"Unsupported Gemma4 assistant layer type {layer_type!r}; "
293	        "expected sliding_attention or full_attention.")
294	
295	
296	def _assert_tokenizers_match(target_dir: str, assistant_dir: str) -> None:
297	
298	    def _token_id_map(tokenizer_path: str) -> dict:
299	        with open(tokenizer_path) as f:
300	            tokenizer = json.load(f)
301	        token_ids = {}
302	        vocab = tokenizer.get("model", {}).get("vocab", {})
303	        if isinstance(vocab, dict):
304	            token_ids.update({
305	                str(token): int(idx)
306	                for token, idx in vocab.items()
307	            })
308	        for entry in tokenizer.get("added_tokens", []):
309	            content = entry.get("content")
310	            idx = entry.get("id")
311	            if content is not None and idx is not None:
312	                token_ids[str(content)] = int(idx)
313	        return token_ids
314	
315	    target_tok = os.path.join(target_dir, "tokenizer.json")
316	    assistant_tok = os.path.join(assistant_dir, "tokenizer.json")
317	    if not os.path.exists(target_tok) or not os.path.exists(assistant_tok):
318	        raise ValueError(
319	            "Gemma4 MTP pairing requires tokenizer.json in both target and assistant checkpoints."
320	        )
321	    if _token_id_map(target_tok) != _token_id_map(assistant_tok):
322	        raise ValueError(
323	            "Gemma4 MTP target and assistant tokenizer token-id maps differ; "
324	            "paired export requires identical token IDs.")
325	
326	
327	def _build_gemma4_kv_sharing_map(target_config: dict,
328	                                 assistant_config: dict) -> list[dict]:
329	    target_text = _get_llm_text_config(target_config)
330	    assistant_text = _get_llm_text_config(assistant_config)
331	    target_types = [
332	        _normalize_gemma4_layer_type(str(layer_type))
333	        for layer_type in target_text.get("layer_types", [])
334	    ]
335	    assistant_types = [
336	        _normalize_gemma4_layer_type(str(layer_type))
337	        for layer_type in assistant_text.get("layer_types", [])
338	    ]
339	    num_shared_target_layers_value = target_text.get("num_kv_shared_layers")
340	    num_shared_target_layers = (len(target_types)
341	                                if num_shared_target_layers_value is None else
342	                                int(num_shared_target_layers_value))
343	    num_shared_target_layers = min(num_shared_target_layers, len(target_types))
344	    target_share_start = len(target_types) - num_shared_target_layers
345	    target_donor_types = target_types[:target_share_start]
346	
347	    kv_sharing_map = []
348	    # Gemma4 assistant layers read target KV from the nearest compatible donor
349	    # before the shared-KV suffix. Layers with the same attention type may
350	    # intentionally share the same target donor.
351	    for assistant_layer, assistant_type in enumerate(assistant_types):
352	        matched_target = None
353	        for target_layer in range(len(target_donor_types) - 1, -1, -1):
354	            if target_types[target_layer] == assistant_type:
355	                matched_target = target_layer
356	                break
357	        if matched_target is None:
358	            raise ValueError(
359	                "Gemma4 MTP assistant layer %d (%s) cannot be mapped to a "
360	                "compatible donor layer before the target shared-KV suffix of %d layers."
361	                % (assistant_layer, assistant_type, num_shared_target_layers))
362	        kv_sharing_map.append({
363	            "assistant_layer": assistant_layer,
364	            "target_attention_layer": matched_target,
365	            "target_layer": matched_target,
366	            "target_layer_type": assistant_type,
367	        })
368	    return kv_sharing_map
369	
370	
371	def _gemma4_head_dim_for_layer(text_config: dict, layer_type: str) -> int:
372	    if layer_type == "full_attention" and text_config.get("global_head_dim"):
373	        return int(text_config["global_head_dim"])
374	    return int(text_config.get("head_dim", 0))
375	
376	
377	def _gemma4_num_kv_heads_for_layer(text_config: dict, layer_type: str) -> int:
378	    if (layer_type == "full_attention" and text_config.get("attention_k_eq_v")
379	            and text_config.get("num_global_key_value_heads")):
380	        return int(text_config["num_global_key_value_heads"])
381	    return int(text_config.get("num_key_value_heads", 0))
382	
383	
384	def _validate_gemma4_kv_sharing_contract(target_config: dict,
385	                                         assistant_config: dict,
386	                                         kv_sharing_map: list[dict]) -> None:
387	    target_text = _get_llm_text_config(target_config)
388	    assistant_text = _get_llm_text_config(assistant_config)
389	    target_types = [
390	        _normalize_gemma4_layer_type(str(layer_type))
391	        for layer_type in target_text.get("layer_types", [])
392	    ]
393	    assistant_types = [
394	        _normalize_gemma4_layer_type(str(layer_type))
395	        for layer_type in assistant_text.get("layer_types", [])
396	    ]
397	    if len(assistant_types) != int(assistant_text.get("num_hidden_layers", 0)):
398	        raise ValueError(
399	            "Gemma4 MTP assistant layer_types length must match num_hidden_layers."
400	        )
401	    if len(target_types) != int(target_text.get("num_hidden_layers", 0)):
402	        raise ValueError(
403	            "Gemma4 MTP target layer_types length must match num_hidden_layers."
404	        )
405	    if len(kv_sharing_map) != len(assistant_types):
406	        raise ValueError(
407	            "Gemma4 MTP kv_sharing_map length must match assistant layer count."
408	        )
409	
410	    seen_layers = set()
411	    for entry in kv_sharing_map:
412	        assistant_layer = int(entry["assistant_layer"])
413	        target_layer = int(entry["target_attention_layer"])
414	        if assistant_layer in seen_layers:
415	            raise ValueError(
416	                "Gemma4 MTP kv_sharing_map has duplicate assistant layer %d." %
417	                assistant_layer)
418	        seen_layers.add(assistant_layer)
419	        if assistant_layer < 0 or assistant_layer >= len(assistant_types):
420	            raise ValueError(
421	                "Gemma4 MTP assistant layer %d is outside the assistant layer range."
422	                % assistant_layer)
423	        if target_layer < 0 or target_layer >= len(target_types):
424	            raise ValueError(
425	                "Gemma4 MTP target donor layer %d is outside the target layer range."
426	                % target_layer)
427	
428	        assistant_type = assistant_types[assistant_layer]
429	        target_type = target_types[target_layer]
430	        if assistant_type != target_type:
431	            raise ValueError(
432	                "Gemma4 MTP layer type mismatch: assistant layer %d is %s, target donor layer %d is %s."
433	                % (assistant_layer, assistant_type, target_layer, target_type))
434	
435	        assistant_head_dim = _gemma4_head_dim_for_layer(
436	            assistant_text, assistant_type)
437	        target_head_dim = _gemma4_head_dim_for_layer(target_text, target_type)
438	        if assistant_head_dim != target_head_dim:
439	            raise ValueError(
440	                "Gemma4 MTP KV head_dim mismatch: assistant layer %d head_dim=%d, target donor layer %d head_dim=%d."
441	                % (assistant_layer, assistant_head_dim, target_layer,
442	                   target_head_dim))
443	
444	        assistant_kv_heads = _gemma4_num_kv_heads_for_layer(
445	            assistant_text, assistant_type)
446	        target_kv_heads = _gemma4_num_kv_heads_for_layer(
447	            target_text, target_type)
448	        if assistant_kv_heads != target_kv_heads:
449	            raise ValueError(
450	                "Gemma4 MTP KV head mismatch: assistant layer %d num_kv_heads=%d, target donor layer %d num_kv_heads=%d."
451	                % (assistant_layer, assistant_kv_heads, target_layer,
452	                   target_kv_heads))
453	
454	    expected_layers = set(range(len(assistant_types)))
455	    if seen_layers != expected_layers:
456	        missing = sorted(expected_layers - seen_layers)
457	        raise ValueError(
458	            "Gemma4 MTP kv_sharing_map is missing assistant layers: %s." %
459	            missing)
460	
461	
462	def _validate_gemma4_mtp_pair(target_dir: str,
463	                              assistant_dir: str) -> list[dict]:
464	    target_config = _load_config(target_dir)
465	    assistant_config = _load_config(assistant_dir)
466	    target_text = _get_llm_text_config(target_config)
467	    assistant_text = _get_llm_text_config(assistant_config)
468	
469	    if target_text.get("model_type") not in ("gemma4", "gemma4_text"):
470	        raise ValueError(
471	            "Gemma4 MTP target must have model_type gemma4/gemma4_text in text_config."
472	        )
473	    if assistant_config.get("model_type") != "gemma4_assistant":
474	        raise ValueError(
475	            "Gemma4 MTP assistant must have root model_type gemma4_assistant.")
476	    if int(target_text.get("hidden_size", 0)) != int(
477	            assistant_config.get("backbone_hidden_size", 0)):
478	        raise ValueError(
479	            "Gemma4 MTP hidden mismatch: target hidden_size=%s, assistant backbone_hidden_size=%s"
480	            % (target_text.get("hidden_size"),
481	               assistant_config.get("backbone_hidden_size")))
482	    if int(target_text.get("vocab_size",
483	                           0)) != int(assistant_text.get("vocab_size", 0)):
484	        raise ValueError(
485	            "Gemma4 MTP vocab mismatch: target vocab_size=%s, assistant vocab_size=%s"
486	            %
487	            (target_text.get("vocab_size"), assistant_text.get("vocab_size")))
488	    if int(assistant_text.get("num_kv_shared_layers", 0)) != int(
489	            assistant_text.get("num_hidden_layers", 0)):
490	        raise ValueError(
491	            "Gemma4 MTP assistant requires num_kv_shared_layers == num_hidden_layers."
492	        )
493	    _assert_tokenizers_match(target_dir, assistant_dir)
494	    kv_sharing_map = _build_gemma4_kv_sharing_map(target_config,
495	                                                  assistant_config)
496	    _validate_gemma4_kv_sharing_contract(target_config, assistant_config,
497	                                         kv_sharing_map)
498	    return kv_sharing_map
499	
500	
501	def _find_token_id(model_dir: str, token_str: str) -> "Optional[int]":
502	    """Return the token ID for *token_str* by scanning tokenizer files."""
503	    # tokenizer.json: scan ``added_tokens`` and ``added_tokens_decoder`` in a
504	    # single open. Qwen3-Omni / VL-style ckpts ship the special-token IDs here.
505	    tok_path = os.path.join(model_dir, "tokenizer.json")
506	    if os.path.exists(tok_path):
507	        with open(tok_path) as f:
508	            tok = json.load(f)
509	        for entry in tok.get("added_tokens", []):
510	            if entry.get("content") == token_str:
511	                return int(entry["id"])
512	        for id_str, entry in tok.get("added_tokens_decoder", {}).items():
513	            if entry.get("content") == token_str:
514	                return int(id_str)
515	    # added_tokens.json: older HF tokenizer split-file form.
516	    added_path = os.path.join(model_dir, "added_tokens.json")
517	    if os.path.exists(added_path):
518	        with open(added_path) as f:
519	            added = json.load(f)
520	        if token_str in added:
521	            return int(added[token_str])
522	    # vocab.json: BPE base vocabulary (regular words, not special tokens).
523	    # Required for Qwen3-ASR ckpts which ship only ``vocab.json`` +
524	    # ``merges.txt`` (no ``tokenizer.json``), so the literal word ``"user"``
525	    # has to be resolved here.
526	    vocab_path = os.path.join(model_dir, "vocab.json")
527	    if os.path.exists(vocab_path):
528	        with open(vocab_path) as f:
529	            vocab = json.load(f)
530	        if token_str in vocab:
531	            return int(vocab[token_str])
532	    logger.warning("Could not find token ID for %r in %s", token_str,
533	                   model_dir)
534	    return None
535	
536	
537	def _load_all_weights(model_dir: str) -> dict:
538	    """Load all safetensors shards in *model_dir* into a flat dict."""
539	    import glob
540	
541	    from safetensors.torch import load_file
542	
543	    shards = sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(model_dir, "*.safetensors")))
544	    if not shards:
545	        logger.error("No safetensors files found in %s", model_dir)
546	        sys.exit(1)
547	    weights: dict = {}
548	    for shard in shards:
549	        logger.info("  Loading shard: %s", os.path.basename(shard))
550	        weights.update(load_file(shard, device="cpu"))
551	    return weights
552	
553	
554	def _to_fp16(tensors: dict) -> dict:
555	    """Cast bfloat16 tensors to float16 for C++ runtime compatibility.
556	
557	    The C++ runtime requires FP16 (or FP8) for sidecar weight files.
558	    Checkpoints often store weights in bfloat16.
559	    """
560	    import torch
561	    return {
562	        k: v.to(torch.float16) if v.dtype == torch.bfloat16 else v
563	        for k, v in tensors.items()
564	    }
565	
566	
567	def _dtype_from_str(s: str) -> "torch.dtype":
568	    import torch
569	    mapping = {
570	        "float16": torch.float16,
571	        "fp16": torch.float16,
572	        "bfloat16": torch.bfloat16,
573	        "bf16": torch.bfloat16,
574	        "float32": torch.float32,
575	        "fp32": torch.float32,
576	    }
577	    if s not in mapping:
578	        logger.error("Unknown dtype %r. Choose from: %s", s,
579	                     ", ".join(mapping))
580	        sys.exit(1)
581	    return mapping[s]
582	
583	
584	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
585	# Multimodal special-token ID resolution
586	#
587	# The C++ runtime (``llmEngineRunner.cpp``) reads ``audio_token_id`` and
588	# ``image_token_id`` from the LLM's ``config.json`` to find placeholder
589	# positions that must be replaced with encoder embeddings.  When those fields
590	# are 0 (default), the runtime skips substitution and the model generates text
591	# like "I can't hear audio".
592	#
593	# Different checkpoint families keep the IDs in different places.  Each
594	# family has its own collector; ``_patch_multimodal_token_ids`` picks the
595	# right one based on ``model_type``.
596	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
597	
598	_TOKEN_KEYS = (
599	    "audio_token_id",
600	    "audio_start_token_id",
601	    "audio_end_token_id",
602	    "image_token_id",
603	    "video_token_id",
604	    "vision_start_token_id",
605	    "vision_end_token_id",
606	)
607	
608	
609	def _collect_tokens_from_thinker_config(root: dict) -> dict:
610	    """Qwen3-Omni / Qwen3-ASR: IDs live under ``thinker_config`` (with root
611	    as fallback for flatter variants)."""
612	    thinker_cfg = root.get("thinker_config") or {}
613	    out: dict = {}
614	    for key in _TOKEN_KEYS:
615	        value = thinker_cfg.get(key, root.get(key))
616	        if isinstance(value, int):
617	            out[key] = value
618	    return out
619	
620	
621	def _collect_tokens_from_nemotron_root(root: dict) -> dict:
622	    """Nemotron-Omni: checkpoint-local names at the root level, renamed to
623	    the runtime's canonical names."""
624	    rename = {
625	        "img_context_token_id": "image_token_id",
626	        "sound_context_token_id": "audio_token_id",
627	    }
628	    out: dict = {}
629	    for src_key, dst_key in rename.items():
630	        v = root.get(src_key)
631	        if isinstance(v, int):
632	            out[dst_key] = v
633	    return out
634	
635	
636	def _collect_tokens_from_tokenizer_fallback(model_dir: str) -> dict:
637	    """Generic VLM fallback: resolve the image placeholder by tokenizing its
638	    special-token string.  Used when no structured config exposes the ID."""
639	    out: dict = {}
640	    image_id = _find_token_id(model_dir, "<|image_pad|>")
641	    if image_id is not None:
642	        out["image_token_id"] = image_id
643	    return out
644	
645	
646	def _collect_gemma4_tokenizer_fallback(model_dir: str,
647	                                       model_type: str = "") -> dict:
648	    """Gemma4 fallback for multimodal placeholders.
649	
650	    Gemma4's PLE preprocessor uses image/audio token IDs to zero-fill the token
651	    identity component at multimodal positions. Prefer structured config fields
652	    when present, but resolve the standard placeholder tokens from tokenizer
653	    assets when the source config is flat or incomplete.  Gemma4 Unified
654	    checkpoints name the placeholders ``<|image|>`` / ``<|audio|>``.
655	    """
656	    unified = str(model_type).startswith("gemma4_unified")
657	    image_tokens = ("<|image|>",
658	                    "<|image_pad|>") if unified else ("<|image_pad|>", )
659	    audio_tokens = ("<|audio|>",
660	                    "<|audio_pad|>") if unified else ("<|audio_pad|>", )
661	    out: dict = {}
662	    for token in image_tokens:
663	        image_id = _find_token_id(model_dir, token)
664	        if image_id is not None:
665	            out["image_token_id"] = image_id
666	            break
667	    for token in audio_tokens:
668	        audio_id = _find_token_id(model_dir, token)
669	        if audio_id is not None:
670	            out["audio_token_id"] = audio_id
671	            break
672	    return out
673	
674	
675	def _collect_user_token_id(model_dir: str, root: dict) -> dict:
676	    """Resolve ``user_token_id`` for Qwen3-ASR / Qwen3-Omni.
677	
678	    Qwen3-ASR's source HF config does not expose this field at the
679	    ``thinker_config`` or root level. When the config does not carry it, fall
680	    back to a BPE ``vocab.json`` lookup of the literal ``"user"`` word.
681	    """
682	    thinker_cfg = root.get("thinker_config") or {}
683	    v = thinker_cfg.get("user_token_id", root.get("user_token_id"))
684	    if isinstance(v, int):
685	        return {"user_token_id": v}
686	    v = _find_token_id(model_dir, "user")
687	    if v is not None:
688	        return {"user_token_id": v}
689	    return {}
690	
691	
692	def _patch_multimodal_token_ids(model_dir: str, llm_out_dir: str,
693	                                model_type: str) -> None:
694	    """Inject multimodal special-token IDs into the exported LLM's ``config.json``.
695	
696	    Dispatches to the family-specific collector in priority order:
697	    thinker_config → Nemotron rename → tokenizer fallback.  Any IDs a
698	    later collector returns that aren't already set by an earlier one are
699	    merged in (handles hybrid layouts).
700	    """
701	    cfg_path = os.path.join(llm_out_dir, "config.json")
702	    if not os.path.exists(cfg_path):
703	        return
704	
705	    root = _load_config(model_dir)
706	    collected: dict = {}
707	
708	    # Primary collectors keyed by model family.
709	    if model_type in _NEMOTRON_OMNI_MODEL_TYPES:
710	        collected.update(_collect_tokens_from_nemotron_root(root))
711	    else:
712	        collected.update(_collect_tokens_from_thinker_config(root))
713	
714	    # Historical fallback: any VLM still missing image_token_id — resolve
715	    # from the tokenizer's ``<|image_pad|>`` special token.
716	    if "image_token_id" not in collected and model_type in _VLM_MODEL_TYPES:
717	        collected.update(_collect_tokens_from_tokenizer_fallback(model_dir))
718	        if "image_token_id" not in collected:
719	            collected.update(
720	                _collect_tokens_from_tokenizer_fallback(llm_out_dir))
721	
722	    # Gemma4 PLE needs multimodal placeholder IDs for zero-filling PLE token
723	    # identity at image/audio positions.
724	    if model_type in _GEMMA4_MODEL_TYPES:
725	        fallback = _collect_gemma4_tokenizer_fallback(llm_out_dir, model_type)
726	        fallback.update(
727	            _collect_gemma4_tokenizer_fallback(model_dir, model_type))
728	        for key in ("image_token_id", "audio_token_id"):
729	            if key not in collected and key in fallback:
730	                collected[key] = fallback[key]
731	
732	    # Qwen3-ASR / Qwen3-Omni metadata: ``user_token_id`` (with a BPE vocab
733	    # fallback) plus the ``model: "qwen3asrthinker"`` tag.
734	    if model_type in _ASR_LLM_MODEL_TYPES:
735	        collected.update(_collect_user_token_id(model_dir, root))
736	        if model_type == "qwen3_asr":
737	            collected["model"] = "qwen3asrthinker"
738	
739	    if not collected:
740	        return
741	
742	    with open(cfg_path) as f:
743	        cfg = json.load(f)
744	    cfg.update(collected)
745	    with open(cfg_path, "w") as f:
746	        json.dump(cfg, f, indent=2)
747	    pretty = ", ".join(f"{k}={v}" for k, v in collected.items())
748	    logger.info("[LLM] Patched multimodal token IDs: %s", pretty)
749	
750	
751	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
752	# Export stages
753	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
754	
755	
756	def _is_nvfp4_checkpoint(model_dir: str) -> bool:
757	    """Return True if *model_dir* contains an NVFP4-quantized checkpoint.
758	
759	    Checks ``hf_quant_config.json`` and ``config.json`` for FP4/NVFP4
760	    quantization indicators.
761	    """
762	    for fname in ("hf_quant_config.json", "config.json"):
763	        path = os.path.join(model_dir, fname)
764	        if not os.path.isfile(path):
765	            continue
766	        try:
767	            with open(path) as f:
768	                cfg = json.load(f)
769	        except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
770	            continue
771	        # hf_quant_config.json nests under "quantization"
772	        quant_section = cfg.get("quantization", {})
773	        # config.json embeds under "quantization_config"
774	        qcfg = cfg.get("quantization_config", {})
775	        # Check all known algo key names across both sections
776	        for section in (cfg, quant_section, qcfg):
777	            for key in ("algorithm", "quant_algo", "quant_method"):
778	                algo = section.get(key, "")
779	                if isinstance(algo, str) and "FP4" in algo.upper():
780	                    return True
781	    return False
782	
783	
784	def _alpamayo_llm_key_remap(key: str) -> "Optional[str]":
785	    """Remap ``vlm.lm_head.*`` → ``lm_head.*`` (not covered by prefix detection)."""
786	    if key.startswith("vlm.lm_head."):
787	        return key[len("vlm."):]
788	    return key
789	
790	
791	def _export_llm(model_dir: str,
792	                llm_out_dir: str,
793	                model_type: str = "",
794	                eagle_base: bool = False,
795	                fp8_embedding: bool = False,
796	                reduced_vocab_dir: str = "",
797	                mtp_base: bool = False,
798	                dflash_base: bool = False,
799	                dflash_tree_base: bool = False,
800	                dflash_draft_dir: str = "",
801	                gemma4_mtp_base: bool = False,
802	                externalize_weights: "list[str] | None" = None,
803	                tp_size: int = 1,
804	                num_decoder_layers: "int | None" = None) -> None:
805	    """Export LLM backbone via the standard tensorrt_edgellm pipeline.
806	
807	    When ``tp_size > 1``, exports ``tp_size`` per-rank ONNX files named
808	    ``model_tp{N}_rank{R}.onnx`` (matches ``cpp/builder/llmBuilder.cpp``).
809	    Each rank reloads the checkpoint fresh and shards weights to its
810	    slice on assignment.
811	    """
812	    os.makedirs(llm_out_dir, exist_ok=True)
813	
814	    key_remap = (_alpamayo_llm_key_remap
815	                 if model_type == "alpamayo_r1" else None)
816	
817	    # ModelOpt-quantized Qwen3-MoE / Qwen3-Omni-MoE checkpoints store per-expert
818	    # weights under ``mlp.experts.{j}.`` (modelopt's fused-expert export, for
819	    # both bare Qwen3-MoE and Qwen3-Omni Thinker / Talker). The model wraps the
820	    # per-expert ModuleList behind a private ``_experts`` attribute, so a
821	    # one-segment insertion is required for the load to find the buffers.
822	    # Without this remap the loader silently skips every expert weight,
823	    # producing a Thinker engine ~3 GB (attention + norms only) instead of the
824	    # expected ~17 GB.
825	    if key_remap is None and model_type in ("qwen3_omni_moe_text",
826	                                            "qwen3_omni_moe_talker",
827	                                            "qwen3_omni_moe", "qwen3_moe"):
828	        from ..models.qwen3_moe import MODELOPT_KEY_REMAP
829	        key_remap = MODELOPT_KEY_REMAP
830	
831	    # Gemma4 NVFP4 MoE: checkpoint stores router/experts at layer level but
832	    # model tree nests them under moe_block with _experts indirection.
833	    # Only activate when the checkpoint is NVFP4-quantized (otherwise the
834	    # FP16 dense path uses router/experts directly on the layer).
835	    if key_remap is None and model_type in _GEMMA4_MODEL_TYPES:
836	        if _is_nvfp4_checkpoint(model_dir):
837	            config_path = os.path.join(model_dir, "config.json")
838	            with open(config_path) as f:
839	                _cfg = json.load(f)
840	            _llm = _cfg.get("text_config", _cfg)
841	            # Only MoE checkpoints (e.g. 26B-A4B) nest router/experts under
842	            # moe_block and need the remap; dense NVFP4 checkpoints (E2B/E4B/
843	            # 31B) have enable_moe_block=False and export directly.
844	            if _llm.get("enable_moe_block", False):
845	                from ..models.gemma4.modeling_gemma4_text import \
846	                    GEMMA4_NVFP4_KEY_REMAP
847	                key_remap = GEMMA4_NVFP4_KEY_REMAP
848	
849	    if tp_size <= 1:
850	        ranks = [(0, 1)]
851	        out_paths = [os.path.join(llm_out_dir, "model.onnx")]
852	    else:
853	        ranks = [(r, tp_size) for r in range(tp_size)]
854	        out_paths = [
855	            os.path.join(llm_out_dir, f"model_tp{tp_size}_rank{r}.onnx")
856	            for r in range(tp_size)
857	        ]
858	
859	    for (rank, world), output_path in zip(ranks, out_paths):
860	        if world > 1:
861	            logger.info("[LLM] === rank %d / %d ===", rank, world)
862	
863	        logger.info("[LLM] Loading checkpoint from %s", model_dir)
864	        try:
865	            from ..model import AutoModel
866	            model = AutoModel.from_pretrained(
867	                model_dir,
868	                device="cpu",
869	                eagle_base=eagle_base,
870	                key_remap=key_remap,
871	                reduced_vocab_dir=reduced_vocab_dir or None,
872	                mtp_base=mtp_base,
873	                dflash_base=dflash_base,
874	                dflash_tree_base=dflash_tree_base,
875	                dflash_draft_dir=dflash_draft_dir or None,
876	                gemma4_mtp_base=gemma4_mtp_base,
877	                tp_size=world,
878	                tp_rank=rank,
879	                num_decoder_layers=num_decoder_layers,
880	            )
881	        except (OSError, ValueError, RuntimeError, ImportError) as exc:
882	            logger.exception("[LLM] Failed to load checkpoint")
883	            raise SystemExit(1) from exc
884	
885	        # Per-rank runtime config so each rank artifact is self-describing.
886	        # Single-device exports keep the conventional "config.json".
887	        config_filename = ("config.json" if world == 1 else
888	                           f"config_tp{world}_rank{rank}.json")
889	
890	        logger.info("[LLM] Exporting to %s", output_path)
891	        try:
892	            from ..onnx.export import export_onnx
893	            export_onnx(model,
894	                        output_path,
895	                        model_dir=model_dir,
896	                        fp8_embedding=fp8_embedding,
897	                        reduced_vocab_dir=reduced_vocab_dir,
898	                        externalize_weights=externalize_weights,
899	                        config_filename=config_filename)
900	        except (OSError, ValueError, RuntimeError) as exc:
901	            logger.exception("[LLM] ONNX export failed")
902	            raise SystemExit(1) from exc
903	
904	        # Free this rank's model before building the next one
905	        del model
906	
907	    # Patch multimodal token IDs into the LLM config so the C++ runtime
908	    # can identify which positions in the token stream must be replaced
909	    # with vision / audio encoder embeddings (see ``llmEngineRunner.cpp``
910	    # ``audio_token_id`` / ``image_token_id`` lookup).
911	    #
912	    # Source of truth: ``thinker_config`` (Qwen3-Omni) or root config
913	    # (Qwen-VL / Nemotron-Omni).  Naming conventions vary across checkpoints
914	    # — see :func:`_patch_multimodal_token_ids` for the fallback chain.
915	    _patch_multimodal_token_ids(model_dir, llm_out_dir, model_type)
916	
917	    # Standalone Talker checkpoints route through ``_export_llm`` (not the
918	    # qwen3_tts ``_export_talker``) because their model_type isn't in the
919	    # ``_LLM_COMPONENTS`` Talker-dispatch map. They still need the TTS
920	    # config fields (accept_hidden_layer, speaker_id, default_speaker_id,
921	    # tts_*_token_id, codec_*_id) that runtime ``Qwen3OmniTTSRuntime``
922	    # validates. Without these the engine config has nulls and the C++
923	    # runtime falls back to wrong defaults → Talker doesn't EOS properly.
924	    if model_type in ("qwen3_omni_moe_talker", "qwen3_omni_talker"):
925	        _patch_tts_config(model_dir, llm_out_dir)
926	
927	    logger.info("[LLM] Done: %s", output_path)
928	
929	
930	def _export_mtp_draft(model_dir: str,
931	                      draft_out_dir: str,
932	                      externalize_weights: "list[str] | None" = None) -> None:
933	    """Export the MTP draft model."""

935	    output_path = os.path.join(draft_out_dir, "model.onnx")

937	    logger.info("[MTP Draft] Loading checkpoint from %s", model_dir)

941	                                          device="cpu",

952	                    model_dir=model_dir,
953	                    externalize_weights=externalize_weights)
954	    except (OSError, ValueError, RuntimeError) as exc:
955	        logger.exception("[MTP Draft] ONNX export failed")
956	        raise SystemExit(1) from exc

958	    logger.info("[MTP Draft] Done: %s", output_path)

961	def _export_gemma4_mtp_draft(target_dir: str, draft_out_dir: str,
962	                             assistant_dir: str,
963	                             kv_sharing_map: list[dict]) -> None:
964	    """Export the paired Gemma4 assistant draft model."""
965	    os.makedirs(draft_out_dir, exist_ok=True)
966	    output_path = os.path.join(draft_out_dir, "model.onnx")
967	    logger.info("[Gemma4 MTP Draft] Target checkpoint: %s", target_dir)
968	    logger.info("[Gemma4 MTP Draft] Loading assistant checkpoint from %s",
969	                assistant_dir)
970	    try:
971	        from ..checkpoint.checkpoint_utils import write_runtime_artifacts
972	        from ..model import AutoModel, load_model_config
973	        target_model_config = load_model_config(target_dir)
974	        model = AutoModel.from_pretrained(
975	            assistant_dir,
976	            device="cpu",
977	            gemma4_mtp_draft=True,
978	            gemma4_kv_sharing_map=kv_sharing_map,
979	            gemma4_target_kv_cache_quant=target_model_config.quant.
980	            kv_cache_quant,
981	        )
982	        write_runtime_artifacts(model, assistant_dir, draft_out_dir)
983	    except (OSError, ValueError, RuntimeError, ImportError) as exc:
984	        logger.exception("[Gemma4 MTP Draft] Failed to load assistant")
985	        raise SystemExit(1) from exc
986	
987	    logger.info("[Gemma4 MTP Draft] Exporting assistant ONNX to %s",
988	                output_path)
989	    try:
990	        from ..onnx.export import export_onnx
991	        export_onnx(model, output_path, model_dir=assistant_dir)
992	    except (OSError, ValueError, RuntimeError) as exc:
993	        logger.exception("[Gemma4 MTP Draft] ONNX export failed")
994	        raise SystemExit(1) from exc
995	
996	    logger.info("[Gemma4 MTP Draft] Done: %s", output_path)

999	def _export_dflash_draft(model_dir: str,
1000	                         draft_out_dir: str,
1001	                         dflash_draft_dir: str,
1002	                         draft_reduced_vocab_dir: str = "") -> None:
1003	    """Export the DFlash draft model, optionally with reduced vocabulary."""
1004	    os.makedirs(draft_out_dir, exist_ok=True)
1005	    output_path = os.path.join(draft_out_dir, "model.onnx")
1006	
1007	    logger.info("[DFlash Draft] Loading checkpoint from %s", dflash_draft_dir)
1008	    try:
1009	        from ..model import AutoModel
1010	        model = AutoModel.from_pretrained(model_dir,
1011	                                          device="cpu",
1012	                                          dflash_draft=True,
1013	                                          dflash_draft_dir=dflash_draft_dir)
1014	    except (OSError, ValueError, RuntimeError, ImportError) as exc:
1015	        logger.exception("[DFlash Draft] Failed to load checkpoint")
1016	        raise SystemExit(1) from exc
1017	
1018	    # --- Optional: reduce draft lm_head vocabulary ---
1019	    full_size = model.config.vocab_size
1020	    reduced_size = None
1021	    if draft_reduced_vocab_dir:
1022	        logger.info("[DFlash Draft] Applying vocab reduction from %s",
1023	                    draft_reduced_vocab_dir)
1024	        try:
1025	            from ..vocab_reduction.onnx_export import \
1026	                apply_reduced_vocab_from_dir

1028	            reduced_size = model.config.reduced_vocab_size
1029	            logger.info("[DFlash Draft] lm_head reduced: %d → %d", full_size,
1030	                        reduced_size)

1032	            logger.exception("[DFlash Draft] Vocab reduction failed")
1033	            raise SystemExit(1) from exc

1035	    logger.info("[DFlash Draft] Exporting to %s", output_path)
1036	    try:
1037	        from ..onnx.export import export_onnx
1038	        export_onnx(model, output_path, model_dir=dflash_draft_dir)
1039	    except (OSError, ValueError, RuntimeError) as exc:
1040	        logger.exception("[DFlash Draft] ONNX export failed")
1041	        raise SystemExit(1) from exc

1043	    # FP16/FP32 RoPE fix is handled automatically by export_onnx() which
1044	    # reads DFlashDraftModel.match_fp32_elementwise_initializers = True
1045	    # and passes it to _fix_initializer_dtypes().

1047	    # --- Save draft vocab map sidecar for C++ runtime ---
1048	    if draft_reduced_vocab_dir:
1049	        from safetensors.torch import save_file as _save_safetensors
1050	
1051	        from ..vocab_reduction.constants import (DRAFT_VOCAB_INFO_NAME,
1052	                                                 DRAFT_VOCAB_MAP_NAME)
1053	        vocab_map = model._reduced_vocab_map_for_runtime
1054	
1055	        map_path = os.path.join(draft_out_dir, DRAFT_VOCAB_MAP_NAME)
1056	        _save_safetensors({"vocab_map": vocab_map.cpu().to(torch.int32)},
1057	                          map_path)
1058	        logger.info("[DFlash Draft] Wrote draft vocab map: %s (%d tokens)",
1059	                    map_path, vocab_map.numel())
1060	
1061	        with open(os.path.join(draft_out_dir, DRAFT_VOCAB_INFO_NAME),
1062	                  "w") as fh:
1063	            json.dump(
1064	                {
1065	                    "vocab_size": full_size,
1066	                    "reduced_vocab_size": reduced_size,
1067	                    "source": draft_reduced_vocab_dir
1068	                },
1069	                fh,
1070	                indent=2)
1071	
1072	    logger.info("[DFlash Draft] Done: %s", output_path)

1075	def _export_visual(model_dir: str, visual_out_dir: str, weights: dict,
1076	                   config: dict, model_type: str, dtype: "torch.dtype",
1077	                   model_config: "ModelConfig") -> None:
1078	    """Export visual encoder via from-scratch tensorrt_edgellm pipeline.
1079	
1080	    For Qwen3-Omni-specific checkpoint-key translation (``thinker.visual.*``
1081	    to ``model.visual.*`` plus merger sub-module renames), see
1082	    :mod:`tensorrt_edgellm.models.qwen3_omni.modeling_qwen3_omni_visual`. That
1083	    family is registered in ``_VISUAL_REGISTRY`` for
1084	    ``qwen3_omni`` / ``qwen3_omni_moe`` model_types and runs the
1085	    remap inside its own ``build_qwen3_omni_visual``.
1086	    """
1087	    os.makedirs(visual_out_dir, exist_ok=True)
1088	    output_path = os.path.join(visual_out_dir, "model.onnx")
1089	
1090	    logger.info("[Visual] Exporting %s visual encoder to %s", model_type,
1091	                output_path)
1092	    try:
1093	        from ..onnx.export_encoder import export_visual_onnx
1094	        export_visual_onnx(
1095	            model_dir=model_dir,
1096	            output_path=output_path,
1097	            weights=weights,
1098	            config=config,
1099	            model_type=model_type,
1100	            dtype=dtype,
1101	            model_config=model_config,
1102	        )
1103	    except (OSError, ValueError, RuntimeError) as exc:
1104	        logger.exception("[Visual] ONNX export failed")

1106	    logger.info("[Visual] Done: %s", output_path)
1107	
1108	    # Write a config.json for the C++ runtime.
1109	    # The visual builder will merge builder_config into this file when it
1110	    # builds the engine. Fields needed vary by model family:
1111	    #   InternVL*: image_token_id, text_config (for vocab_size)
1112	    #   all:       model_type, vision_config
1113	    # Qwen3-Omni nests vision_config / text_config / token IDs under
1114	    # thinker_config; other Qwen VL variants keep them at the root.
1115	    _thinker_cfg = config.get("thinker_config", {}) or {}
1116	    vis_cfg = (config.get("vision_config") or _thinker_cfg.get("vision_config")
1117	               or config)
1118	    # Map the top-level checkpoint model_type to the encoder-specific
1119	    # enum the C++ ``stringToModelType`` expects for the visual builder.
1120	    # - ``internvl`` / ``internvl_chat`` → ``internvl``
1121	    # - ``qwen3_omni`` → ``qwen3_omni_vision_encoder`` (bare "qwen3_omni"
1122	    #   maps to AUDIO_ENCODER in C++, so visualBuilder rejects it)
1123	    _VISUAL_MODEL_TYPE_MAP = {
1124	        "internvl": "internvl",
1125	        "internvl_chat": "internvl",
1126	        "qwen3_5_moe": "qwen3_5",
1127	        "qwen3_omni": "qwen3_omni_vision_encoder",
1128	        # MoE variant uses byte-identical visual encoder weights; reuse the
1129	        # same C++ runner enum the dense Qwen3-Omni visual engine registers.
1130	        "qwen3_omni_moe": "qwen3_omni_vision_encoder",
1131	        "gemma4": "gemma4_vision",
1132	        "gemma4_unified": "gemma4_unified_vision",
1133	    }
1134	    top_level_model_type = _VISUAL_MODEL_TYPE_MAP.get(model_type, model_type)
1135	    vis_cfg_out: dict = {
1136	        "model_type": top_level_model_type,
1137	        "vision_config": vis_cfg,
1138	    }
1139	    if model_type == "qwen3_5_moe":
1140	        # The C++ visual builder prefers vision_config.model_type over the
1141	        # top-level model_type.  Qwen3.5-MoE uses the same visual encoder as
1142	        # dense Qwen3.5, so normalize both locations to the registered tag.
1143	        vis_cfg_out["vision_config"] = dict(vis_cfg_out["vision_config"])
1144	        vis_cfg_out["vision_config"]["model_type"] = "qwen3_5"
1145	    if model_type == "qwen3_omni_moe":

1148	        # the C++ visualBuilder enum doesn't recognise. Reuse the
1149	        # ``qwen3_omni_vision_encoder`` registration since the visual

1152	        vis_cfg_out["vision_config"][
1153	            "model_type"] = "qwen3_omni_vision_encoder"

1161	        _text_cfg = (config.get("text_config")

1168	                    "rope_theta"):

1170	                vis_cfg_out[key] = config[key]

1173	            elif key in _text_cfg:

1175	            elif key in _rope_params:
1176	                vis_cfg_out[key] = _rope_params[key]

1184	                         or config.get("rope_parameters"))

1187	                _rope_scaling)

1192	        vis_cfg_out["model_type"] = visual_model_type
1193	        vis_cfg_out["vision_config"]["model_type"] = visual_model_type
1194	        text_cfg = config.get("text_config") or {}
1195	        if text_cfg:
1196	            vis_cfg_out["text_config"] = text_cfg
1197	        for key in ("image_token_id", "audio_token_id", "boi_token_id",
1198	                    "eoi_token_id", "boa_token_id", "eoa_token_index"):
1199	            if key in config:
1200	                vis_cfg_out[key] = config[key]
1201	        if "image_token_id" not in vis_cfg_out:
1202	            image_token = ("<|image|>" if model_type == "gemma4_unified" else
1203	                           "<|image_pad|>")
1204	            image_token_id = _find_token_id(model_dir, image_token)
1205	            if image_token_id is not None:

1207	        if "audio_token_id" not in vis_cfg_out:

1222	            if os.path.exists(processor_path):

1224	                    processor_config = json.load(f)
1225	                image_processor = processor_config.get("image_processor") or {}
1226	                max_soft_tokens = image_processor.get("max_soft_tokens",
1227	                                                      max_soft_tokens)
1228	            if max_soft_tokens is not None:
1229	                max_soft_tokens = int(max_soft_tokens)

1231	                    "max_image_tokens_per_image": max_soft_tokens,
1232	                }

1234	        # HF Qwen3-Omni-MoE 30B-A3B-Instruct vision_config omits the

1241	        vc_out = vis_cfg_out.get("vision_config", {})
1242	        if isinstance(vc_out,
1243	                      dict) and "num_position_embeddings" not in vc_out:
1244	            _img = vc_out.get("image_size")
1245	            _pat = vc_out.get("patch_size")
1246	            if _img is not None and _pat:

1254	            # Qwen3OmniViTRunner reads it.
1255	            _pips = _thinker_cfg.get("position_id_per_seconds",

1257	            if _pips is not None:

1259	                    vis_cfg_out["vision_config"])
1260	                vis_cfg_out["vision_config"]["position_id_per_seconds"] = _pips
1261	
1262	    if model_type == "gemma4":
1263	        vis_cfg_out["vision_config"] = dict(vis_cfg_out["vision_config"])
1264	        vis_cfg_out["vision_config"]["model_type"] = "gemma4_vision"
1265	        text_cfg = config.get("text_config") or {}
1266	        if text_cfg:
1267	            vis_cfg_out["text_config"] = text_cfg
1268	        if "image_token_id" in config:
1269	            vis_cfg_out["image_token_id"] = config["image_token_id"]
1270	        else:

1273	                vis_cfg_out["image_token_id"] = image_token_id

1293	            if img_proc:

1299	                    "[Visual] Extracted preprocessor_config.json from "
1300	                    "processor_config.json to %s", visual_out_dir)
1301	            else:

1303	                    "[Visual] processor_config.json has no "
1304	                    "image_processor key at %s", proc_src)

1416	    logger.info("[Audio] Done: %s", output_path)
1417	
1418	    # Write config.json for the C++ runtime
1419	    if model_type == "gemma4_unified":
1420	        audio_cfg = dict(config.get("audio_config") or {})
1421	        audio_cfg["model_type"] = "gemma4_unified_audio"
1422	        audio_cfg_out = {
1423	            "model_type": "gemma4_unified_audio",
1424	            "audio_config": audio_cfg,
1425	        }
1426	        text_cfg = config.get("text_config") or {}
1427	        if text_cfg:
1428	            audio_cfg_out["text_config"] = text_cfg
1429	        for key in ("audio_token_id", "image_token_id", "boi_token_id",
1430	                    "eoi_token_id", "boa_token_id", "eoa_token_index"):
1431	            if key in config:
1432	                audio_cfg_out[key] = config[key]
1433	
1434	        # The source checkpoint keeps raw-waveform framing metadata in the
1435	        # nested feature_extractor section of processor_config.json.  Copy it
1436	        # into the runtime sidecar so the C++ Unified runner does not have to
1437	        # parse an unrelated Hugging Face processor file.
1438	        processor_path = os.path.join(model_dir, "processor_config.json")
1439	        if os.path.exists(processor_path):
1440	            with open(processor_path) as f:
1441	                processor_config = json.load(f)
1442	            feature_extractor = processor_config.get("feature_extractor") or {}
1443	            if feature_extractor:
1444	                audio_cfg_out["feature_extractor"] = feature_extractor
1445	                for key in ("audio_samples_per_token", "sampling_rate",
1446	                            "feature_size", "padding_value"):
1447	                    if key in feature_extractor and key not in audio_cfg:
1448	                        audio_cfg[key] = feature_extractor[key]
1449	    elif model_type in _NEMOTRON_OMNI_MODEL_TYPES:
1450	        # Nemotron-Omni carries ``sound_config`` at the root with its own
1451	        # encoder model_type; keep the full root config alongside so the
1452	        # builder sees everything it needs.
1453	        audio_cfg_out = dict(config)
1454	        sound_model_type = config.get("sound_config", {}).get("model_type")
1455	        if sound_model_type is None:
1456	            raise ValueError(
1457	                "sound_config.model_type not found in config.json")
1458	        audio_cfg_out["model_type"] = sound_model_type
1459	    elif model_type == "gemma4":
1460	        # Gemma4 audio encoder config lives at ``config["audio_config"]``.
1461	        # The C++ audioBuilder requires ``num_mel_bins`` inside audio_config;
1462	        # HF config may omit it (defaults to 128 in Python model code).
1463	        audio_cfg = dict(config.get("audio_config", {}))
1464	        if "num_mel_bins" not in audio_cfg:
1465	            audio_cfg["num_mel_bins"] = 128
1466	        audio_cfg_out = {
1467	            "model_type": "gemma4_audio",
1468	            "audio_config": audio_cfg,
1469	            "builder_config": {
1470	                "max_code_len": 2000,
1471	                "max_time_steps": 6000,
1472	                "min_code_len": 1,
1473	                "min_time_steps": 100,
1474	                "opt_code_len": 300,
1475	            },
1476	        }
1477	        # Propagate audio_token_id from top-level config.
1478	        audio_token_id = config.get("audio_token_id")
1479	        if audio_token_id is None:
1480	            audio_token_id = _find_token_id(model_dir, "<|audio_pad|>")
1481	        if audio_token_id is not None:
1482	            audio_cfg_out["audio_token_id"] = audio_token_id
1483	        # boa/eoa delimiters: gemma4AudioRunner wraps each audio span with
1484	        # them to mirror the HF processor layout (boa + N soft tokens + eoa).
1485	        boa_token_id = config.get("boa_token_id")
1486	        if boa_token_id is None:
1487	            boa_token_id = _find_token_id(model_dir, "<|audio>")
1488	        if boa_token_id is not None:
1489	            audio_cfg_out["boa_token_id"] = boa_token_id
1490	        eoa_token_id = config.get("eoa_token_index",
1491	                                  config.get("eoa_token_id"))
1492	        if eoa_token_id is None:
1493	            eoa_token_id = _find_token_id(model_dir, "<audio|>")
1494	        if eoa_token_id is not None:
1495	            audio_cfg_out["eoa_token_id"] = eoa_token_id
1496	    else:
1497	        # Qwen3-family: read the nested ``audio_config`` and map top-level
1498	        # model_type to the encoder-specific enum the C++ builder expects
1499	        # (``qwen3_asr_thinker``, ``qwen3_omni_audio_encoder``).
1500	        audio_cfg = config.get("thinker_config",
1501	                               {}).get("audio_config",
1502	                                       config.get("audio_config", {}))
1503	        _AUDIO_MODEL_TYPE_MAP = {
1504	            "qwen3_asr": "qwen3_asr_thinker",
1505	            "qwen3_omni": "qwen3_omni_audio_encoder",
1506	            "qwen3_omni_moe": "qwen3_omni_audio_encoder",
1507	        }
1508	        audio_model_type = _AUDIO_MODEL_TYPE_MAP.get(model_type, model_type)
1509	        audio_cfg_out = {
1510	            "model_type": audio_model_type,
1511	            "audio_config": audio_cfg,
1512	        }
1513	        # Propagate multimodal token IDs from ``thinker_config`` to the audio
1514	        # encoder's config.  ``audioRunner.cpp`` reads ``audio_token_id`` from
1515	        # this file to know which placeholder tokens in the prompt to replace
1516	        # with audio-encoder embeddings.  Without it, the runtime falls back
1517	        # to id 0 → no substitution → thinker answers "I can't hear audio".
1518	        thinker_cfg = config.get("thinker_config", {}) or {}
1519	        for key in ("audio_token_id", "audio_start_token_id",
1520	                    "audio_end_token_id"):
1521	            if key in thinker_cfg:
1522	                audio_cfg_out[key] = thinker_cfg[key]
1523	        # ``user_token_id`` for downstream metadata consumers.
1524	        audio_cfg_out.update(_collect_user_token_id(model_dir, config))
1525	        # ``text_config.rope_theta`` is read by
1526	        # ``Qwen3OmniAudioRunner::loadConfig`` for MRope initialisation. For
1527	        # Qwen3-ASR/Omni this lives under ``thinker_config.text_config``.
1528	        text_cfg = (thinker_cfg.get("text_config") or config.get("text_config")
1529	                    or {})
1530	        rope_theta = text_cfg.get("rope_theta")
1531	        if rope_theta is not None:
1532	            audio_cfg_out["text_config"] = {"rope_theta": rope_theta}
1533	    if os.environ.get("USE_TRT_NATIVE_ATTN") == "1":
1534	        audio_cfg_out["use_trt_native_audio_attn"] = True
1535	    cfg_out_path = os.path.join(audio_out_dir, "config.json")
1536	    with open(cfg_out_path, "w") as f:
1537	        json.dump(audio_cfg_out, f, indent=2)
1538	    logger.info("[Audio] Wrote config.json: %s", cfg_out_path)
1539

1545	
1546	def _export_code2wav(model_dir: str, c2w_out_dir: str, weights: dict,
1547	                     config: dict, model_type: str,
1548	                     dtype: "torch.dtype") -> None:
1549	    """Export Code2Wav vocoder via the standalone tensorrt_edgellm implementation.
1550	
1551	    The vocoder converts discrete RVQ codec tokens
1552	    ``[batch, num_quantizers, code_length]`` into continuous audio
1553	    waveforms ``[batch, 1, code_length * total_upsample]``.
1554	
1555	    Qwen3-Omni stores Code2Wav weights in the shared checkpoint under the
1556	    ``code2wav.`` prefix. Qwen3-TTS stores the vocoder in the
1557	    ``speech_tokenizer/`` subdirectory.
1558	    """
1559	    os.makedirs(c2w_out_dir, exist_ok=True)
1560	    output_path = os.path.join(c2w_out_dir, "model.onnx")
1561	
1562	    if model_type == "qwen3_tts":
1563	        logger.info("[Code2Wav] Exporting Qwen3-TTS speech tokenizer")
1564	        try:
1565	            from ..models.qwen3_tts import export_qwen3_tts_code2wav
1566	            export_qwen3_tts_code2wav(model_dir, c2w_out_dir, dtype)
1567	        except (OSError, ValueError, RuntimeError, ImportError) as exc:
1568	            logger.exception("[Code2Wav] Qwen3-TTS export failed")
1569	            raise SystemExit(1) from exc
1570	        logger.info("[Code2Wav] Done: %s", output_path)
1571	        return
1572	
1573	    c2w_cfg = config.get("code2wav_config")
1574	    if not c2w_cfg:
1575	        logger.error(
1576	            "code2wav_config not found in config.json — cannot export Code2Wav"
1577	        )
1578	        sys.exit(1)
1579	
1580	    logger.info("[Code2Wav] Building model and loading weights")
1581	    try:
1582	        from ..models.qwen3_omni import build_code2wav, export_code2wav_onnx
1583	        model = build_code2wav(c2w_cfg, weights, dtype)
1584	    except (OSError, ValueError, RuntimeError, ImportError) as exc:
1585	        logger.exception("[Code2Wav] Failed to build model")
1586	        raise SystemExit(1) from exc
1587	
1588	    logger.info("[Code2Wav] Exporting ONNX to %s", output_path)
1589	    try:
1590	        export_code2wav_onnx(model, output_path, c2w_cfg)
1591	    except (OSError, ValueError, RuntimeError) as exc:
1592	        logger.exception("[Code2Wav] ONNX export failed")
1593	        raise SystemExit(1) from exc
1594	
1595	    # Write a config.json that the C++ runtime / engine builder can consume.
1596	    # Match the layout produced by tensorrt_edgellm.export_code2wav_config:
1597	    # top-level model_type is "qwen3_omni_code2wav" and the sub-config
1598	    # carries the same model_type for parser compatibility.
1599	    c2w_cfg_out = dict(c2w_cfg)
1600	    c2w_cfg_out["model_type"] = "qwen3_omni_code2wav"
1601	    cfg_out_path = os.path.join(c2w_out_dir, "config.json")
1602	    with open(cfg_out_path, "w") as f:
1603	        json.dump(
1604	            {
1605	                "model_type": "qwen3_omni_code2wav",
1606	                "code2wav_config": c2w_cfg_out,
1607	            },
1608	            f,
1609	            indent=2)
1610	    logger.info("[Code2Wav] Wrote config.json: %s", cfg_out_path)
1611	    logger.info("[Code2Wav] Done: %s", output_path)
1612
